zone_6b_notes: Direct sow after soil reaches 60°F (mid-May in Farmington). Zone 6b's warm summers produce excellent cucumbers — expect harvest in 55–65 days. Train vertically on a trellis to save space and improve air circulation. Missouri heat and humidity promote bacterial wilt via cucumber beetles — row covers early help.
water: consistent — bitter cucumbers result from water stress; 1 inch per week minimum
